metadata.description: OpenHarmony/KaihongOS software porting workflow and Claude Code privacy cleanup tools

plugins.name: ohos-porting
plugins.description: OpenHarmony/KaihongOS software porting workflow.将 Linux 库/软件适配到 OHOS，包含诊断分析、交叉编译、设备部署全流程支持。

plugins.name: auto-clean
plugins.description: Auto-cleans Claude Code tracking data and privacy information. Supports init reset, deep clean, and automatic cleanup on exit.
